music.name: Certified Groovers × Sneak's Beats: Louie Vega
music.why: Master of ceremonies Louie Vega for a marathon daytime house session in DTLA.
music.summary: Certified Groovers and Sneak's Beats present Louie Vega for a marathon Saturday afternoon through midnight deep house session at a TBA DTLA location, 21+, tickets $40.

music.name: Lost In Dreams
music.address: 1245 N Spring St, Los Angeles, CA 90012
music.why: Insomniac's melodic dubstep festival returns to the park — two-day park camping vibes without leaving the city.
music.summary: Lost In Dreams is Insomniac's two-day melodic dubstep and progressive house festival at LA State Historic Park, 18+, running Saturday afternoon through Sunday night with a multi-stage lineup.

music.name: Claude VonStroke Presents Wrong#Number – Open Air
music.address: 624 S Anderson St, Los Angeles, CA 90023
music.why: Dirtybird founder throws a free open-air Sunday afternoon — the cheeky, fun counter-programming.
music.summary: Claude VonStroke presents his Wrong#Number event as a free Sunday open-air set in an DTLA courtyard, 3–8pm, 21+, with RSVP.

music.name: Mike Servito & Jason Kendig
music.why: Detroit-schooled techno from two of the scene's most respected selectors — premium but earned.
music.summary: Mike Servito and Jason Kendig play a joint set at a TBA DTLA location Saturday 11pm–5am, 21+, tickets $47.

music.name: Klaudia Gawlas, Gigi b2b Gerard Not Gerald
music.why: European techno pedigree for the late-night crowd who outlast every other party.
music.summary: Klaudia Gawlas headlines alongside Gigi b2b Gerard Not Gerald at a TBA LA venue, Saturday 11pm–5am, 21+, $25–40.

music.name: I Love DnB: Jumpin Jack Frost + Ray Keith
music.why: Two UK drum & bass legends on one LA bill — rare, raw, and authentic jungle.
music.summary: I Love DnB brings Jumpin Jack Frost and Ray Keith together for a Saturday night 6-hour D&B and jungle set at a TBA Los Angeles venue, $23.

music.name: Factory 93: Beltran
music.address: 1756 Naud St, Los Angeles, CA 90012
music.why: Factory 93's warehouse series – premium tech house with a Mixmag-caliber headliner.
music.summary: Factory 93 presents Beltran for a Saturday afternoon warehouse tech house set at Insomniac's DTLA space starting at 5pm, 21+, with premium tickets $113–273.

music.name: Hypersleep – Rooftop Day Party
music.why: Free rooftop progressive house from 3pm — the day-before festival warm-up without spending extra.
music.summary: Hypersleep hosts a free Saturday afternoon rooftop deep progressive house day party at Somewhere Special, 3–9pm, 21+.

music.name: Day Trip feat. Omnom, Marco Strous, Slamm
music.address: 1245 N Spring St, Los Angeles, CA 90012
music.why: Day Trip's park series caps the Lost In Dreams festival weekend — sun, grass, tech house.
music.summary: Day Trip presents Omnom, Marco Strous, and Slamm for a Sunday afternoon outdoor tech house event at LA State Historic Park, 2–8:30pm, 21+, $55.

music.name: Emmit Fenn
music.address: 1642 N Las Palmas Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90028
music.why: Streaming-era synthpop artist doing a DJ set at LA's finest listening room — Thursday gem.
music.summary: Emmit Fenn plays a DJ set at Sound Nightclub in Hollywood, Thursday 10pm–3am, 21+, $31.

music.name: Fan Zone World Cup Closing Party: Sidepiece, Ship Wrek, Martin Ikin
music.address: Windward Plaza, Venice, CA 90291
music.why: World Cup finale energy meets beachfront tech house — Sidepiece on the beach at Venice.
music.summary: The World Cup Fan Zone closing party at Windward Plaza Venice features Sidepiece, Ship Wrek, and Martin Ikin for a Sunday afternoon outdoor tech house event, 3–10pm, 21+, $30–60.

music.name: Monstercat 15 Year: Brownies & Lemonade
music.address: 1720 E 16th St, Los Angeles, CA 90021
music.why: Brownies & Lemonade throw Monstercat's milestone LA bash — the label's 15-year catalog on one dance floor.
music.summary: Brownies & Lemonade presents the Monstercat 15 Year Anniversary celebration at 1720 Los Angeles, Thursday 9pm–3am, 18+, $33.48.

music.name: Simon Says: Felix Da Housecat
music.address: 734 N La Brea Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90038
music.why: Chicago house icon for a tight Spotlight crowd — history in a small room.
music.summary: Felix Da Housecat headlines the Simon Says night at The Spotlight in Hollywood, Saturday 10pm–2am, 21+, from $19.

music.name: Day Thief, Faited, and Sosoftly
music.why: Three local heavy-hitters in a TBA DTLA space — early-bird $20 is the move.
music.summary: Day Thief, Faited, and Sosoftly headline a Friday techno and house night at a TBA DTLA venue, 10pm–4am, 21+, $20–50.

music.name: Sunday Sessions LA – Vinyl Only Open Air
music.address: 1424 W Sunset Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90026
music.why: Vinyl-only outdoor Sunday session at a Silverlake rooftop — analog purist's Sunday reward.
music.summary: Sunday Sessions LA hosts a vinyl-only open-air tech house and minimal night at Apotheke Silverlake, Sunday 6pm–midnight, 21+, free before 7pm then $22.66–34.50.

music.name: Naach: Ivory (Extended Set), Hydeclip, Arthur Onni
music.why: Arts District warehouse with an extended headliner set — no rush, just music until 4am.
music.summary: Naach presents Ivory for an extended 7-hour set alongside Hydeclip and Arthur Onni in a TBA Arts District warehouse, Saturday 9pm–4am, 21+, $35.

music.name: Emergence: Nikroma (Live), Andrew S., Synchronometry
music.why: Nine-hour psytechno and trance rave from dusk to dawn — the underground antidote to the festival.
music.summary: Emergence presents Nikroma live alongside Andrew S., Demek, Synchronometry, and others for a 9-hour psytechno/trance underground rave Saturday 9pm–6am, 21+, $15–30.

music.name: House//Minimal 13: Araminta, MAEYO, hombre plata, Shredy
music.address: 1200 W Temple St, Los Angeles, CA 90026
music.why: Free Friday minimal night with four selectors — the underground alternative to every headliner show.
music.summary: House//Minimal Vol. 13 brings Araminta, MAEYO, hombre plata, and Shredy to Lost and Found LA for a free Friday tech house and minimal night, 9pm–2am, 21+.

music.name: Ruben Karapetyan, DJ Ruby, Dr Mirzoyan
music.address: 3833 W Sunset Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90026
music.why: Eastside prog-house in a proper club, $28 flat — no surprises.
music.summary: Ruben Karapetyan plays alongside DJ Ruby and Dr Mirzoyan at Berlin in Silverlake, Saturday 10pm–5am, 21+, $28.25.

music.name: Atmosphere Vol. 1: The Baptist, MVSX, Chad Beisner
music.why: Inaugural Atmosphere night — new series, warehouse, $30 to be in on the ground floor.
music.summary: Atmosphere Vol. 1 launches with The Baptist, MVSX, and Chad Beisner at a TBA DTLA warehouse, Saturday 10pm–5am, 21+, $30.

music.name: Surface DIY: Jane Margarette, Pollensource & Capes
music.address: 210 E Olympic Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90015
music.why: DIY Thursday progressive house for $10 — the purist option when you skip the Friday headliners.
music.summary: Surface DIY hosts Jane Margarette, Pollensource, and Capes at Better Tomorrow in DTLA, Thursday 10pm–4am, 21+, $10.

music.name: Kates Not Here Invites: Debra, CNR, BEEBA
music.address: 5021 York Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90042
music.why: Free techno night in a Highland Park bar — the neighborhood underground answer to club prices.
music.summary: Kates Not Here Invites presents Debra, CNR, and BEEBA for a free Thursday techno night at Blind Barber in Highland Park, 9pm–2am, 21+.

music.name: Audien
music.address: 1735 N Vine St, Los Angeles, CA 90028
music.why: Classic big-room headliner at Hollywood's most iconic venue — reliable crowd energy.
music.summary: Audien plays a Saturday night big room and progressive house set at Avalon Hollywood, 10pm–2am, 21+, $35.

music.name: R3hab
music.address: 6021 Hollywood Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90028
music.why: Big-room EDM benchmark night — all the stadium sounds in a Hollywood club.
music.summary: R3hab brings big-room house and pop EDM to Academy LA on Saturday night from 10pm, 21+, tickets $40.

music.name: Disco Devils: Argot, Bobby Sauce, Ben666, Jordan Hofbauer
music.address: 5922 N Figueroa St, Los Angeles, CA 90042
music.why: Free Sunday disco and house in Highland Park — a neighbourhood closer-to-earth alternative to festival weekends.
music.summary: Disco Devils brings Argot, Bobby Sauce, Ben666, and Jordan Hofbauer for a free Sunday afternoon house and disco set at LA Cuevita in Highland Park, 3–8pm, 21+.

music.name: Flying Lotus (Live Band)
music.address: 7251 Melrose Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90046
music.why: LA's own FlyLo in a club setting with a full live band — $19 all-ages deal.
music.summary: Flying Lotus performs with his live band at the intimate Blue Note LA in Hollywood on Saturday, all ages, with tickets starting at $19 for glitch-hop and future beats.

music.name: Flying Lotus (Live Band) – Night 2
music.address: 7251 Melrose Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90046
music.why: Second night if Saturday sold out – same band, different energy as the week closes.
music.summary: Flying Lotus returns Sunday night for a second live band performance at Blue Note LA, all ages, tickets $19–100.

music.name: Good Society – Open Air Under 6th Street Bridge
music.address: 6th Street Viaduct, Los Angeles, CA 90021
music.why: $4 open-air bass under the iconic 6th Street Bridge — the most LA rave you can do.
music.summary: Good Society hosts an open-air dubstep and bass music fundraiser under the 6th Street Viaduct in DTLA, Saturday 8pm–4am, 21+, $4 presale.

music.name: KCRW Summer Nights w/ Manuela: Olive Kimoto and Jason Bentley
music.address: 901 E 3rd St, Los Angeles, CA 90013
music.why: KCRW's annual arts-gallery summer bash — culture meets nightclub in a non-commercial setting.
music.summary: KCRW Summer Nights returns to Hauser & Wirth gallery with Manuela, Olive Kimoto, and Jason Bentley for an all-night house event Saturday 6pm–6am.

music.name: Matt Sassari
music.address: 734 N La Brea Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90038
music.why: French techno craftsman at Hollywood's most focused room — no gimmicks, just floor work.
music.summary: Matt Sassari plays a Friday night techno and tech house set at The Spotlight in Hollywood, 10pm–2am, 21+, $25.

music.name: Maxi Meraki
music.address: 1642 N Las Palmas Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90028
music.why: Global-circuit DJ landing at LA's best-sounding club for an under-the-radar Friday.
music.summary: Maxi Meraki plays progressive house, indie dance, and afro house at Sound Nightclub in Hollywood, Friday 10pm–3am, 21+, $25.

music.name: Sabai
music.address: 6021 Hollywood Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90028
music.why: Future bass built for big rooms — energetic Friday opener before the weekend proper.
music.summary: Sabai brings dubstep and future bass to Academy LA on Friday, 10pm–3am, 21+, $29.

music.name: Tongva Park Open Air: Cafe Grooves × Product Pluto
music.address: 1615 Ocean Ave, Santa Monica, CA 90401
music.why: House by the ocean in a park — the daytime outdoor option without the festival markup.
music.summary: Cafe Grooves and Product Pluto host an afternoon open-air house party at Tongva Park in Santa Monica on Saturday, 1–9pm, $20.

music.name: Township Rebellion, Denyc, Trou
music.address: 1720 E 16th St, Los Angeles, CA 90021
music.why: 1720's east-side prog-house anchor with a melodic headliner and a $21 price point.
music.summary: Township Rebellion heads the bill alongside Denyc and Trou at 1720 in Los Angeles for a Friday progressive house and techno night, 10pm–3am, 21+, $21.

sports.name: AFCEA-LA Annual Cycling Event
sports.address: N Harbor Dr & Portofino Way, Redondo Beach, CA 90277
sports.why: Charity ride along the Redondo Beach waterfront for STEM education — easy coastal route.
sports.summary: AFCEA-LA's annual charity bicycle ride starts at 9am Saturday in Redondo Beach at N Harbor Dr, benefiting STEM education programs.

sports.name: Happy Miles 5K
sports.why: Fun weekend 5K in LA — small field, casual pace, no pressure finish line.
sports.summary: Happy Miles 5K runs Sunday July 12 in Los Angeles — a casual community road race with 100–500 participants.

sports.name: LBC Summer Breeze – 5K/Half Marathon
sports.why: Waterfront summer race in Long Beach — flat course with ocean breeze.
sports.summary: LBC Summer Breeze 5K and half marathon runs Sunday July 12 in Long Beach, with an early 7:30am start along the waterfront.

sports.name: Tech Me 2 Da Beach – Darin Westcott Birthday Bash
sports.address: 5105 E Ocean Blvd, Long Beach, CA 90803
sports.why: Free outdoor beach breaks/house/techno from noon — dogs welcome, tickets not.
sports.summary: Tech Me 2 Da Beach is a free Sunday outdoor event at Rosie's Dog Beach in Long Beach featuring breaks, house, and techno starting at noon, all ages, no tickets needed.
